name: Lemon Frappe'
recipeIngredient: 1 can (6 oz.) frozen lemonade concentrate, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the frozen lemonade concentrate into a container of an electric blender.
2. Add the water and softened lemon ice cream to the blender.
3. Blend all ingredients together until smooth, stopping occasionally to scrape down the sides of the blender.
4. Transfer the mixture to a pitcher.
5. Stir in the ginger ale.
6. Serve immediately. Makes 5 cups.
